latin: Puella in prora navis maximae stabat. iuvenis eam e tergo tenebat. 'volo!' clamavit puella, bracchiis extensis, cum ventus capillos eius ferret. 'rex mundi sum!'

questions.prompt: Where are the two people standing?
questions.target: On the prow of a great ship
choices: On a cliff by the sea
On the prow of a great ship

questions.target: I'm flying! I'm king of the world!
choices: I'm flying! I'm king of the world!

translation: A girl was standing on the prow of the greatest ship. A young man held her from behind. 'I'm flying!' the girl shouted, with arms outstretched, as the wind carried her hair. 'I'm king of the world!'
